allow: Bash(PYTHONPATH=sqlsherlock_env .venv/Scripts/python -c "from openenv.core.env_server import Environment; import inspect; print\([m for m in dir\(Environment\) if not m.startswith\('__'\)]\); print\(inspect.getmembers\(Environment, predicate=inspect.isfunction\)\)")
Bash(PYTHONPATH=sqlsherlock_env .venv/Scripts/python -c "from openenv.core.env_server import Environment; import inspect; src = inspect.getsource\(Environment.state\); print\(src\)")
